creator: heinrich.adam@iml.unibe.ch
text:
I download it from freebsd.org on a macintosh with drag and drop.

Some time this happens that all Text Files are full of hex zeros and the checksum is not right.

I downloaded the dvd iso image with firefox and the checksum is now ok.

BUT

Same download procedure iso checksum is ok :
the 10.3 Release I can install on a ASUS Platform without any problem.
the 11.0 Release I can't install on the same ASUS platform.

there must be a difference.

for 10.3 there are uefi install iso images
are they canceled for 11.0 ?
